theme_and_archetype.rationale: To convey the warmth, coziness, and inviting nature of artisanal coffee shops. This archetype uses warm sands, deep espresso browns, and terracotta accents, establishing immediate trust and sensory comfort.

color_palette.description: Backgrounds are Warm Bone White (#FDFBF7), text is Deep Espresso Brown (#2C1A12). Primary action color is Terracotta/Clay (#B55B49). Accents include Crema (#D4B996) and Warm Beige (#E8E3D9). NO pure black or generic gray.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, leading-none. Do not use generic sans for headings. Emphasize elegance.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 to p-16 for containers. Let the high-quality photography breathe.
layout_and_spacing.collage_grid: Use Mode A (The 'Tetris' Grid) for the coffee shop image collages. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Mix shapes: The Hero (col-span-8 row-span-2), The Square (col-span-4 row-span-1), The Tall (col-span-4 row-span-2).
layout_and_spacing.map_section: Embed the UK map within a Grid Borders wrapper or a subtle Neumorphic container to make it feel integrated, not like a raw Google Maps iframe.

ui_components.navigation: Crystal Glass style. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80, with a delicate 1px border-b border-[#E8E3D9].
ui_components.cards: Subtle, slightly rounded edges (0.25rem). Flat backgrounds matching parent with 1px earthy border. On hover, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and warm shadow (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,26,18,0.08)]).
ui_components.buttons: Terracotta primary background. White text. Avoid heavy border radius; keep it sleek and slightly sharp.
ui_components.images: Always wrap images in a container with a subtle background color in case of slow loading. Images must never exceed 80vh on mobile.

motion.scrolling: Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling. Momentum scrolling makes the editorial typography feel premium.
motion.interactions: Micro-interactions on buttons (scale down 0.98 on click). Staggered fade-up for image grids using Framer Motion.

images.description: Cinematic wide-angle shot of a cozy artisanal coffee shop interior. Use for the main hero section with a gradient overlay.
Abstract topographical map texture. Can be used as a subtle background pattern behind the map section or listing cards.
Close up macro photography of an artisanal latte. Perfect for breaking up text content or the about section.
Coffee shop exterior for listing collage.
Menu and ambient interior for listing collage.

instructions_to_main_agent: FONTS: Import 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
TESTING: Every button, link, and major interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='shop-card-link').
AUTH: Implement Google Auth for users. Admin uses JWT. Ensure protected routes redirect properly.
HERO OVERLAY: Do not use flat heavy black overlays on the hero image. Use a warm gradient (from-black/60 to-transparent) that lets the warm amber tones of the coffee shop shine.
COLLAGE: Ensure the listing page has an asymmetric collage using grid layout. The 'Tetris' grid logic should govern the image sizes.
MAP VIEW: Make the map view toggleable or a prominent section. Style the map to match the warm earthy theme if possible.
